title: Enhanced Leaves
description: Optimized bushy leaves that work with any resource pack!
body:
Enhanced leaves is a resource pack that makes leaves bushier!\
The leaves are even optimized, meaning that they are a lot more FPS-friendly than other bushy leaves packs!\
But don't worry, this doesn't make your leaves bad, they still look amazing, especially with shaders!\
That's not even the end, because this resourcepack also works with any resourcepack, as long as it doesn't modify models, for example [Faithful 64x](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/faithful-64x) will be a great companion pack to this!\
Recommended with [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) for even more FPS!\
Want to get better and more realistic logs as well?\
Try out my other pack, [Enhanced Logs](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/enhanced-logs)!\
This does not require OptiFine or any other mods!\
![Enhanced Leaves](https://i.imgur.com/hx8p5yR.png)\
Enjoy!
